name: sobathq
description: SobatHQ MCP server — exposes Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Sheets, and Slack tools to AI agents
author: SobatHQ

tools.name: gmail_list_unread
tools.description: List unread emails and prioritize inbox

tools.name: gmail_draft_reply
tools.description: Draft an email reply (requires user approval before sending)

messageId.description: Gmail message ID to reply to

tools.name: calendar_list_today
tools.description: List today's calendar events and meetings

tools.name: calendar_create_event
tools.description: Create a calendar event (requires user approval)

tools.name: drive_list_recent
tools.description: List recently modified files in Google Drive

tools.name: sheets_get_report
tools.description: Get a prepared report from Google Sheets

tools.name: slack_send_message
tools.description: Send a Slack message (requires user approval)

tools.name: sobat_daily_briefing
tools.description: Get SobatHQ daily briefing — emails, meetings, follow-ups, and suggested actions

resources.name: User Preferences
resources.description: User work preferences and custom rules remembered by SobatHQ

prompts.name: daily_briefing
prompts.description: Generate a daily work briefing in SobatHQ format

prompts.name: draft_email_reply
prompts.description: Draft a professional email reply for user approval
